items.title: Gold Coast man Leroy Cane remembered for 'huge heart' as Queensland road toll climbs to 95

items.title: ACT Greens leader Shane Rattenbury leaving politics after 17 years

items.title: Shane Flanagan out as St George Illawarra Dragons coach after winless start to NRL season
items.summary: Shane Flanagan and the St George Illawarra Dragons part ways after a winless start to 2026 extends an 11-game losing streak dating back to last August.

items.title: Touring artists wind back shows as fuel crisis bites

items.summary: A huge artificial intelligence data centre capable of training models like ChatGPT is planned for WA's remote north at a cost of billons of dollars.

items.title: Man faces court charged with culpable driving causing death after Melbourne pedestrian death

items.summary: Anchored off Fremantle for weeks because the war in Iran had stopped the live sheep trade to the Middle East, the world's largest live export vessel has ventured north to Darwin.

items.title: Young people taking initiative to quit at Canberra's first dedicated vaping support program

items.title: Liberal candidate under investigation for roadworks ahead of Nepean by-election

items.title: Record earthquake near Cadia gold mine sparks calls for more monitors

items.title: Adelaide Crows to give Jordan Dawson time before AFL return, Matthew Nicks says

items.title: Pale octopus species mysteriously disappears from SA's Spencer Gulf

items.summary: Steve Hawe says he never set out to make a board game — but when inspiration struck, he couldn't ignore it.
